provinces.sectionSubtitle: Five provinces, five must-see cities each—explore China by region

yunnan.name: Yunnan
yunnan.desc: Snow peaks, ancient towns, tropical rainforests, and diverse ethnic cultures.

guangdong.name: Guangdong
guangdong.desc: Cantonese cuisine, modern cities, islands, and diaspora heritage.

jiangsu.name: Jiangsu
jiangsu.desc: Classical gardens, water towns, and storied historical cities.

shandong.name: Shandong
shandong.desc: Home of Confucius, coastal scenery, beer, and seafood.

fujian.name: Fujian
fujian.desc: Maritime Silk Road legacy, tulou, tea culture, and seaside escapes.

kunming.name: Kunming
kunming.desc: Yunnan's mild-climate capital and gateway to Dali and Lijiang, famed for Stone Forest and Dianchi Lake.

dali.name: Dali
dali.desc: Bai ancient town between Cangshan and Erhai—slow living and lake views.

lijiang.name: Lijiang
lijiang.desc: Lijiang is a top destination known for Lijiang Old Town, Jade Dragon Snow Mt., Shuhe, Blue Moon Valley.

jinghong.name: Jinghong
jinghong.desc: Jinghong is a top destination known for Botanical Garden, Wild Elephant Valley, Gaozhuang Night Market, Lancang River.

shangrila.name: Shangri-La
shangrila.desc: Shangri-La is a top destination known for Songzanlin Temple, Potatso Park, Dukezong Old Town, Napa Lake.

guangzhou.name: Guangzhou
guangzhou.desc: Guangzhou is a top destination known for Chen Clan Hall, Shamian, Canton Tower, Beijing Road.

shenzhen.name: Shenzhen
shenzhen.desc: Shenzhen is a top destination known for Ping An Finance Center, OCT, Dapeng Fortress, Shenzhen Bay.

zhuhai.name: Zhuhai
zhuhai.desc: Zhuhai is a top destination known for Lovers' Road, Fisher Girl, Chimelong Ocean Kingdom, New Yuanming Palace.

foshan.name: Foshan
foshan.desc: Foshan is a top destination known for Ancestral Temple, Nanfeng Kiln, Qinghui Garden, Lingnan Tiandi.

shantou.name: Shantou
shantou.desc: Shantou is a top destination known for Old Town Park, Nan'ao Island, Chen Cihong Mansion, Queshi Scenic Area.

nanjing.name: Nanjing
nanjing.desc: Nanjing is a top destination known for Sun Yat-sen Mausoleum, Confucius Temple, City Wall, Presidential Palace.

suzhou.name: Suzhou
suzhou.desc: Suzhou is a top destination known for Humble Admin's Garden, Tiger Hill, Pingjiang Road, Zhouzhuang.

wuxi.name: Wuxi
wuxi.desc: Wuxi is a top destination known for Turtle Head Isle, Lingshan Buddha, Huishan Old Town, Nanchang Street.

yangzhou.name: Yangzhou
yangzhou.desc: Yangzhou is a top destination known for Slender West Lake, Ge Garden, Dongguan Street, Daming Temple.

changzhou.name: Changzhou
changzhou.desc: Changzhou is a top destination known for Dinosaur Park, Tianning Temple, Yancheng Park, Qingguo Alley.

qingdao.name: Qingdao
qingdao.desc: Qingdao is a top destination known for Zhanqiao Pier, Badaguan, Laoshan, Golden Beach.

jinan.name: Jinan
jinan.desc: Jinan is a top destination known for Baotu Spring, Daming Lake, Thousand Buddha Hill, Furong Street.

yantai.name: Yantai
yantai.desc: Yantai is a top destination known for Penglai Pavilion, Yangma Island, Yantai Hill, Golden Beach.

weihai.name: Weihai
weihai.desc: Weihai is a top destination known for Liugong Island, Chengshantou, International Beach, Coastal Road.

qufu.name: Qufu
qufu.desc: Qufu is a top destination known for Confucius Temple, Kong Mansion, Confucius Forest, Nishan Sacred Land.

xiamen.name: Xiamen
xiamen.desc: Xiamen is a top destination known for Gulangyu Island, XMU, Island Ring Road, Zengcuo'an.

fuzhou.name: Fuzhou
fuzhou.desc: Fuzhou is a top destination known for Three Lanes Seven Alleys, Gushan, West Lake Park, Pingtan Island.

quanzhou.name: Quanzhou
quanzhou.desc: Quanzhou is a top destination known for Kaiyuan Temple, West Street, Qingyuan Mountain, Chongwu Ancient City.

wuyishan.name: Wuyishan
wuyishan.desc: Wuyishan is a top destination known for Nine-Bend Bamboo Raft, Tianyou Peak, Da Hong Pao, Wuyi Palace.

zhangzhou.name: Zhangzhou
zhangzhou.desc: Zhangzhou is a top destination known for Nanjing Tulou, Yunshuiyao, Zhangzhou Old Town, Volcano Island.
